untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) detection of intraday mean reversion vs daily non-mean-reversion regime comparison — no indicator provided to distinguish intraday vs daily mean reversion regimes; (2) sector concentration limits — requires sector classification data not in allowed indicators; (3) extended buying period beyond market open — requires intraday time-of-day condition not expressible with allowed operators; (4) optional intraday profit caps — 'optional' parameter cannot be expressed in structured rule format; (5) specific lookback_period, threshold, and half_life parameters marked AUTHOR_SILENT and unavailable.
translation_notes: Core gap-down entry condition translated as open < prev_close. Exit modeled as simple intraday profit cap (returns > 0.02 = ~2% gain). However, the signal's complexity around regime discrimination (intraday vs daily mean reversion), sector limits, and time-windowed entry logic cannot be fully captured with the allowed indicator set and operators. Requires custom logic beyond this schema.
